title: What's new in Cloud Run
summary: Google Cloud Run is a serverless platform designed to simplify deployment of AI agents and inference workloads. New capabilities enable seamless scaling of demanding applications while reducing operational overhead.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video reviews recent additions to Cloud Run, the serverless platform built to simplify deploying AI agents and inference workloads. The updates focus on scaling demanding applications while reducing operational overhead. Key concepts covered include local inference, AI agents, and the serverless model.
